name: project
description: 100% **Frontend-Only** static web app. No backend, server, or external dependencies required. - **Authentication**: localStorage-based signup/login with roles (admin, faculty, librarian, student). - **Data**: All books/users/fines stored in browser localStorage. - **Features**: Dashboards, book search/borrow, reports, real-time counts (polling). - **AI Chat**: Built-in Telugu/English assistant.

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix express-backend" "npm run start --prefix react-frontend"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix express-backend" "npm run start --prefix react-frontend"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix express-backend && npm install --prefix react-frontend
